turns.user_message: I think I'm just not good at keeping promises to myself. It feels like a bad day when I realize it.
I keep breaking the promises I make to myself, and it's become a pattern. I don't trust my own intentions anymore.
I've concluded that my promises are worthless because I never follow through. My own word means nothing to me.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a conclusion they've reached about themselves. This has been going on for a while.
